─[3]-Guides──
CommandsCustomizationGuidesPlatform SupportWorking Across Repos
─[4]-Workflow──
Active Work Architecture
─[ Pilot Daily Checklist (Day 1-5) ]─ ┐

Pilot Daily Checklist (Day 1-5)

Use this for each pilot day. Duplicate the day block if you run longer than 5 days.

Day 1

  • Log deploy_minutes after initial setup
  • Run /sync-from-team and confirm no data loss
  • Perform normal project work for at least one meaningful task
  • Run /reconcile at end of day
  • Log daily_routine_minutes
  • Generate report: python3 scripts/pilot-generate-report.py

Day 2

  • Start with /sync-from-team
  • Log any sync_conflict events (if present)
  • If conflicts occur, log conflict_resolution_minutes
  • Create at least one new skill if a new gotcha appears
  • Run /reconcile and log daily_routine_minutes
  • Generate report and attach to daily notes

Day 3

  • Start with /sync-from-team
  • Contribute at least one useful item upward (/contribute-to-team)
  • Log skill_contributed and any script_failure (if present)
  • Confirm teammate/second instance can sync contributed knowledge
  • Run /reconcile and log daily_routine_minutes
  • Generate report and capture blockers/friction points

Day 4

  • Repeat daily sync/work/reconcile cycle
  • Capture propagation_hours for at least one contribution path
  • Validate no silent overwrite behavior during sync operations
  • Log all friction points using the findings template
  • Generate report and compare trends vs prior days

Day 5

  • Complete final sync/work/reconcile cycle
  • Ensure at least one PR-based contribution was completed end-to-end
  • Confirm all logged critical issues are fixed or explicitly deferred
  • Generate final pilot report
  • Produce go/no-go recommendation for Phase 3 full live test
PgUp/PgDn: scroll b: bulk commands q: quit x: menu ← → ↑ ↓: navigate
Donate 0.24.4
